info.title: Biorhythm API
info.description:
The most complete biorhythm API + remote MCP for AI agents and developers. Hosted MCP server, no local setup, connect Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code in seconds. 10 cycle types: 3 primary (physical, emotional, intellectual), 4 secondary (intuitive, aesthetic, awareness, spiritual), and 3 composite (passion, mastery, wisdom). Critical day detection with severity classification, 90-day forecasts with best and worst day identification, two-person compatibility scoring, phase tracking for dashboards, and seeded daily readings for push notifications. 6 endpoints, 8 languages, sub-millisecond response times, editorial-grade interpretations. Ship a biorhythm feature in hours, not weeks.

# RoxyAPI: AI-Native Insight Infrastructure

> **Base URL:** `https://roxyapi.com/api/v2`
> All endpoint paths below are relative to this base URL.

The only multi-domain spiritual intelligence API. 12 domains (astrology, Vedic astrology, human design, forecast, biorhythm, tarot, numerology, crystals, dreams, I-Ching, angel numbers, location), 148+ endpoints, one API key, instant activation. Remote MCP server per domain plus AGENTS.md for AI coding agents.

## Who uses RoxyAPI

- **Developers** building astrology apps, tarot platforms, numerology calculators, or dream journals
- **AI agent builders** connecting Claude, GPT, or Gemini to real calculation engines via MCP
- **Vibe coders** shipping insight apps with Cursor, Bolt, or Replit using zero domain knowledge
- **Founders and brands** launching branded spiritual experiences for their audience

## Quick start (60 seconds)

**1. Get your API key** at [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing). Instant delivery, no account required.

**2. Make your first call:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/tarot/draw -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"count": 3}'
```

**3. Monitor usage:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/usage
```

## AI agent integration (MCP)

RoxyAPI has native Model Context Protocol support. Your AI agent auto-discovers all 148+ endpoints as callable tools with zero configuration:
- **Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf**: Add MCP server URL in settings
- **OpenAI Agents, Gemini ADK**: Connect via Streamable HTTP transport
- **Custom agents**: Use the MCP Python/TypeScript SDK

MCP endpoints: `https://roxyapi.com/mcp/{domain}` (e.g., `/mcp/astrology`, `/mcp/tarot`)

Setup guide: [roxyapi.com/docs/mcp](https://roxyapi.com/docs/mcp)

## Authentication

All endpoints require an API key via header or query param:
- **Header (recommended):** `X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY`
- **Query param (testing):** `?api_key=YOUR_KEY`

## Response format

Clean JSON, no wrapper objects. Errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`. The `error` field is human-readable (may change wording). The `code` field is machine-readable (stable — safe to switch on programmatically).

Rate limit headers on every response: `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Used`

## Errors

All errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`:

| Status | Code | When |
|--------|------|------|
| 400 | `validation_error` | Missing or invalid parameters. Response includes `issues[]` with per-field `path`, `message`, `code`, `expected`, `minimum`, `maximum`, `format`, `pattern`. |
| 401 | `api_key_required` | No API key provided |
| 401 | `invalid_api_key` | Key format invalid or tampered |
| 401 | `subscription_not_found` | Key references non-existent subscription |
| 401 | `subscription_inactive` | Subscription cancelled, expired, or suspended |
| 404 | `not_found` | Resource not found. Response may include a ranked `suggestions[]` array (each with `endpoint`, `hint`, and a `docs` deep link) for typo recovery. |
| 405 | `method_not_allowed` | Path exists for a different HTTP method. Response includes `allow[]` and the `Allow` header lists valid methods. |
| 429 | `rate_limit_exceeded` | Monthly quota reached |
| 500 | `internal_error` | Server error |

## Pricing

Flat per-request pricing. Every call counts the same, whether a planet position or a full birth chart with aspects. No credit systems, no variable costs. Plans from $39 to $699/month.

See [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing)

## Resources

- [Quickstart guide](https://roxyapi.com/docs/quickstart) - first API call in 60 seconds
- [Documentation](https://roxyapi.com/docs) - guides, tutorials, domain reference
- [MCP setup](https://roxyapi.com/docs/mcp) - connect AI agents
- [Starter apps](https://roxyapi.com/starters) - clone and deploy in 30 minutes
- [FAQ](https://roxyapi.com/faq) - common questions
- [Contact](https://roxyapi.com/contact) - support and API key recovery

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Your API key for accessing RoxyAPI. Alternatively, you can pass the API key as a query parameter "api_key".

post.summary: Get biorhythm reading - Complete cycle analysis for any date
post.description: Calculate a complete biorhythm reading for a given birth date and target date. Returns all 10 cycle values (physical, emotional, intellectual, intuitive, aesthetic, awareness, spiritual, passion, mastery, wisdom), phase detection with 8 distinct states, energy rating (1-10), overall phase assessment, editorial-grade interpretation, actionable advice, and critical day alerts. Perfect for wellness apps, dating platforms, productivity tools, and AI chatbot integrations that need structured biorhythm data.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.
parameters.name: lang

birthDate.description: Birth date of the person in YYYY-MM-DD format. This is the anchor for all biorhythm cycle calculations.

targetDate.description: Date to calculate the reading for in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today (UTC) if omitted.

200.description: Complete biorhythm reading with all 10 cycles, energy rating, interpretation, and critical alerts

birthDate.description: Birth date used for this calculation (YYYY-MM-DD).

daysSinceBirth.description: Total days alive from birth date to target date. This is the basis for all cycle calculations.

value.description: Percentage position in the cycle from -100 (trough) to 100 (peak). 0 represents a critical zero crossing.

rawValue.description: Raw sine wave value before percentage conversion, ranging from -1.0 to 1.0.

phase.description: Current phase of the cycle. One of: peak, high, rising, critical_ascending, critical_descending, falling, low, trough.

phaseLabel.description: Human-readable phase name for display in UIs, dashboards, and reports.

dayInCycle.description: Current day position within the cycle (1-based). Ranges from 1 to the cycle period length.

daysUntilPeak.description: Number of days until the next peak (100%) in this cycle.

daysUntilTrough.description: Number of days until the next trough (-100%) in this cycle.

daysUntilCritical.description: Number of days until the next zero crossing in this cycle.

trend.description: Short-term direction of the cycle. One of: rising, falling, peaking, bottoming.

interpretation.description: Editorial 2-3 sentence reading specific to this cycle at its current phase position.

cycles.description: All 10 biorhythm cycle readings. Keys: physical, emotional, intellectual, intuitive, aesthetic, awareness, spiritual, passion, mastery, wisdom.

energyRating.description: Overall energy score from 1 (deep recovery) to 10 (peak performance), derived from the three primary cycle positions.

overallPhase.description: Summary phase label. One of: high_energy, mixed, recovery, critical.

interpretation.description: Editorial 3-5 sentence reading combining all cycle states into a coherent daily assessment.

advice.description: Actionable 1-2 sentence guidance for the day based on the combined cycle analysis.

cycle.description: Which cycle is at or near zero crossing.

type.description: Alert type. zero_crossing when a cycle crosses zero, approaching_critical when within 1 day of zero.

direction.description: Whether the cycle is rising through zero (ascending) or falling through zero (descending).

advisory.description: Specific advisory text for this critical alert.

criticalAlerts.description: Critical day alerts. Present only when one or more primary cycles are at or near zero crossing.

400.description: Validation error. `issues[]` lists every failed field.

error.description: First issue summary.

issues.description: Every validation failure. Use this to rebuild a valid request.

path.description: Dot-separated field path, or "(root)" for top-level.

code.description: Zod issue code (invalid_type, too_small, too_big, invalid_string, ...).

format.description: Format name for string issues (regex, email, url, uuid).

pattern.description: Regex pattern when format is regex.

error.description: Human-readable error message. May change wording.

405.description: Method not allowed. The path exists but only responds to the methods listed in `allow[]` and the `Allow` response header.

allow.description: Allowed HTTP methods for this path. Mirrors the Allow response header.

post.summary: Get biorhythm forecast - Multi-day cycle predictions with best and worst days
post.description: Generate a biorhythm forecast for a date range up to 90 days. Returns daily cycle values for physical, emotional, intellectual, and intuitive cycles, daily energy ratings, critical day identification, and a summary with best day, worst day, average energy, and period-level guidance. Ideal for wellness apps, productivity planners, scheduling tools, and calendar integrations that need forward-looking biorhythm data.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.
parameters.name: lang

birthDate.description: Birth date of the person in YYYY-MM-DD format.

startDate.description: Start date of the forecast range in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today (UTC).

endDate.description: End date of the forecast range in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to startDate + 30 days. Maximum range: 90 days.

200.description: Biorhythm forecast with daily readings, summary, and best/worst day identification

birthDate.description: Birth date used for this calculation.

startDate.description: First day of the forecast range.

endDate.description: Last day of the forecast range.

totalDays.description: Number of days in the forecast range.

bestDay.description: Date with the highest average primary cycle values in the range. Best day for demanding activities.

worstDay.description: Date with the lowest average primary cycle values in the range. Best scheduled as a rest day.

criticalDayCount.description: Total number of days where at least one primary cycle crosses zero in the range.

averageEnergy.description: Average energy rating (1-10) across the entire forecast period.

periodAdvice.description: Overview guidance for the entire forecast period based on average energy and cycle patterns.

daysSinceBirth.description: Days from birth date to this date.

isCritical.description: True if any primary cycle crosses zero on this day.

criticalCycles.description: Which primary cycles are critical on this day. Empty array if none.

days.description: Array of daily readings, one per day in the forecast range.

code.description: Zod issue code (invalid_type, too_small, too_big, invalid_string, ...).

format.description: Format name for string issues (regex, email, url, uuid).

pattern.description: Regex pattern when format is regex.

error.description: Human-readable error message. May change wording.

post.summary: Find critical days - Zero crossing detection for any date range
post.description: Find all critical days (zero crossings) within a date range up to 180 days. Returns each critical day with cycle name, period, direction (ascending or descending), severity (single, double, or triple), and advisory text. Highlights rare double critical days where two primary cycles cross zero simultaneously and extremely rare triple critical days where all three primary cycles cross zero on the same date. Ideal for calendar integrations, push notification systems, alert engines, and wellness scheduling tools.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.
parameters.name: lang

birthDate.description: Birth date of the person in YYYY-MM-DD format.

startDate.description: Start date of the search range in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today (UTC).

endDate.description: End date of the search range in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to startDate + 90 days. Maximum range: 180 days.

200.description: Critical days with zero crossing details, severity levels, and advisory text

birthDate.description: Birth date used for this calculation.

totalCriticalDays.description: Total count of critical day events in the range. A double critical day counts as two events.

cycle.description: Which primary cycle crosses zero on this date.

direction.description: Whether the cycle is rising through zero (ascending) or falling through zero (descending).

severity.description: How many primary cycles are critical on this date. single, double, or triple.

advisory.description: Advisory text explaining the significance of this critical day and recommended precautions.

criticalDays.description: All critical day events in the range, sorted by date.

doubleCriticalDays.description: Dates where 2 or more primary cycles cross zero simultaneously. These are particularly significant days requiring extra caution.

tripleCriticalDay.description: Date where all 3 primary cycles cross zero simultaneously. Extremely rare event. Null if none found in range.

post.summary: Calculate compatibility - Biorhythm alignment between two people
post.description: Calculate biorhythm compatibility between two people by overlaying their cycle profiles on a target date. Returns per-cycle alignment scores (0-100) for physical, emotional, and intellectual cycles, an overall compatibility score, relationship rating, strengths, challenges, practical advice, and a daily sync snapshot showing the absolute difference in each primary cycle. Perfect for dating apps, relationship platforms, team-building tools, and couples coaching applications.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.
parameters.name: lang

birthDate.description: Birth date of person 1 in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Birth date of person 2 in YYYY-MM-DD format.

targetDate.description: Date to evaluate compatibility on in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today (UTC). Compatibility varies by day since biorhythm cycles are continuous.

200.description: Biorhythm compatibility analysis with per-cycle alignment, overall score, and relationship guidance

targetDate.description: Date this compatibility was calculated for.

overallScore.description: Overall compatibility score from 0 (fully opposed) to 100 (perfectly synchronized).

rating.description: Compatibility rating label. One of: Highly Aligned, Well Aligned, Moderately Aligned, Misaligned, Opposed.

person1Value.description: Person 1 cycle value on the target date (-100 to 100).

person2Value.description: Person 2 cycle value on the target date (-100 to 100).

difference.description: Absolute difference between the two values (0-200). Lower values indicate better alignment.

alignment.description: Alignment score from 0 (perfectly opposed) to 100 (perfectly in sync).

phase.description: Alignment phase. One of: in_sync, complementary, neutral, opposing.

description.description: Human-readable description of how this cycle alignment affects the relationship.

cycles.description: Per-cycle compatibility analysis for physical, emotional, and intellectual cycles.

strengths.description: Relationship strengths based on the compatibility profile.

challenges.description: Potential relationship challenges to be aware of.

advice.description: Practical relationship guidance based on the combined cycle analysis.

physicalDiff.description: Absolute difference in physical cycle values (0-200). Lower = more aligned.

emotionalDiff.description: Absolute difference in emotional cycle values (0-200). Lower = more aligned.

intellectualDiff.description: Absolute difference in intellectual cycle values (0-200). Lower = more aligned.

post.summary: Get phase info - Lightweight cycle status for dashboards and widgets
post.description: Get current phase information for all 10 biorhythm cycles without the full interpretation payload. Returns value, phase name, phase label, day position within cycle, cycle period, days until next critical crossing, and short-term trend for each cycle. Includes a compact summary string. Designed as a lightweight endpoint for dashboards, widgets, status bars, and quick-check interfaces that need biorhythm phase data without editorial text.

birthDate.description: Birth date used for this calculation.

targetDate.description: Date this phase info is for.

daysSinceBirth.description: Total days alive from birth date to target date.

dayInCycle.description: Current day position within the cycle.

totalDays.description: Cycle period in days. 0 for composite cycles (passion, mastery, wisdom).

trend.description: Short-term direction: rising, falling, peaking, or bottoming.

phases.description: Phase information for all 10 cycles keyed by cycle ID.

summary.description: Quick overview string summarizing the current state of all cycles.

post.summary: Get daily biorhythm - Seeded reading for daily check-in features
post.description: Get a daily biorhythm reading with seeded randomness for consistent "biorhythm of the day" features. Same seed and same date always produce the same reading, perfect for daily push notifications, morning briefings, and wellness app check-ins. Returns energy rating, overall phase, a spotlight on one featured cycle, quick-read values for all three primary cycles, a daily message, and actionable advice. The spotlight cycle is deterministically selected by the seed, creating variety across users while maintaining consistency for each individual.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.
parameters.name: lang

seed.description: Optional seed for reproducible readings. Same seed + same date = same reading every time. Pass any unique identifier (userId, email hash, session token). Omit for anonymous daily readings.

date.description: Date for the reading in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today (UTC). Useful for viewing past daily readings or pre-generating future ones.

200.description: Daily biorhythm reading with spotlight cycle and actionable guidance

date.description: Date this daily reading is for (YYYY-MM-DD, UTC).

seed.description: Computed seed used for this reading. Same seed always produces the same reading.

overallPhase.description: Summary phase. One of: high_energy, mixed, recovery, critical.

cycle.description: Which primary cycle is featured as the daily spotlight.

value.description: Current value of the spotlight cycle (-100 to 100).

phase.description: Current phase of the spotlight cycle.

message.description: Personalized message about the spotlight cycle and what it means for today.

dailyMessage.description: Concise daily biorhythm message combining energy rating and spotlight cycle.

advice.description: Actionable 1-2 sentence guidance for the day.
